label: Ritual outcome comp (participant count)
description: Scores quality based on the number of pawns who participated for at least half the ritual duration. Uses the curve to map participant count to quality offset.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown in the ritual quality breakdown UI.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Not used directly; quality is computed from the curve.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: SimpleCurve mapping participant count (X) to quality offset (Y).
